all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And Pharaoh said unto Joseph, I am Pharaoh, and without thee shall no man lift up his hand or foot in all the land of Egypt.
Genesis 41:44
Quote of the Day
"This is the church of new beginnings! This is the church of fresh starts!"
Elder Patrick Kearon | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
